error_signature: Sheet with name Abril not found
title: Google Sheets node cannot find specified sheet
symptom: The Google Sheets node throws an error stating 'Sheet with name Abril not found' when trying to access a sheet dynamically using an expression.
applies_when: Dynamic sheet name based on agent output
not_this_if: Sheet name is hardcoded and exists
No whitespaces in the sheet name
root_cause: The error occurs because the dynamic sheet name derived from the agent's output may contain leading or trailing whitespace characters, which prevents the Google Sheets node from correctly identifying the sheet.
fix_steps: Modify the expression in the Google Sheets node to use `$json.month.trim()`
Test the workflow again to ensure the sheet is found
agent_instruction: Use `$json.month.trim()` in the Google Sheets node to remove any whitespace from the sheet name.
